tipping_point.evidence: US-China tech decoupling advancing to production-level restrictions

assessments.cross_impact_notes: Further restriction of advanced AI chips to China accelerates the US-China tech decoupling. This benefits Korean semiconductor firms in the short term (reduced competition for non-China markets) but raises long-term risks of Chinese indigenous chip development accelerating.
